title: carpinus kweichowensis
intro: Carpinus kweichowensis, also known as the Chinese hornbeam, is a deciduous tree species native to China, belonging to the family Betulaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Carpinus kweichowensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing swelling and fighting off infections. The herbal preparations of Carpinus kweichowensis include decoctions, infusions, and infusions in combination with other herbs, which are typically consumed in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
